title: Samsung 387L Single Door Upright Refrigerator with Twin Cooling Plus & Digital Inverter - RR39M71407F/ZA, Refined Steel
description: The Samsung RR39M71407F is a spacious 387-litre single-door, all-fridge tower finished in refined steel that gives you maximum chilled storage without a separate freezer compartment. Twin Cooling Plus technology and an All-Around Cooling system circulate cold air to every shelf so food stays fresh for longer, while the Digital Inverter Compressor runs quietly and efficiently for years. No Frost technology stops ice build-up so you never have to defrost manually. A convertible drawer and adjustable shelving make it easy to organise everything from family groceries to bulk weekly shops.
shortDescription: 387L single-door fridge with Twin Cooling Plus, No Frost and Digital Inverter Compressor.
warranty: 2 years manufacturer warranty (10 years on Digital Inverter Compressor)

images.alt: Samsung RR39M71407F 387L single door refrigerator in refined steel, front view
Samsung RR39M71407F refrigerator interior shelving and storage
Samsung RR39M71407F refrigerator with door open showing capacity

faqs.question: Does this refrigerator have a freezer?
faqs.answer: No. The RR39M71407F is an all-fridge model, so the entire 387 litres is dedicated to chilled refrigeration with no separate freezer compartment, making it ideal as a primary fridge or as a second unit alongside a freezer.

faqs.question: Do I need to defrost it manually?
faqs.answer: No. It uses Samsung No Frost technology, which automatically prevents frost and ice build-up so there is no need for manual defrosting.

faqs.question: Is the compressor warranty really 10 years?
faqs.answer: Yes. Samsung backs the Digital Inverter Compressor with a 10-year warranty, in addition to the standard 2-year overall manufacturer warranty.

metaTitle: Samsung 387L Single Door Refrigerator RR39M71407F Twin Cooling | PRIMO

title: LG 658L (23.2 cu.ft) Side-by-Side Refrigerator with Smart Inverter Compressor & LinearCooling - LS25CBBDIK, Silver
description: The LG LS25CBBDIK is a large 658-litre (23.2 cu.ft) side-by-side refrigerator that pairs generous family storage with smart, energy-efficient cooling. LinearCooling minimises temperature fluctuations to keep food fresh for up to 7 days, while Multi Air Flow vents cool air across every corner of the cabinet. The Smart Inverter Compressor runs quietly and efficiently, and LG ThinQ with Smart Diagnosis lets you monitor and troubleshoot the fridge from your phone. Its durable PCM silver finish resists fingerprints and complements any modern kitchen.
shortDescription: 658L side-by-side fridge with Smart Inverter Compressor, LinearCooling and ThinQ.
warranty: 2 years manufacturer warranty (10 years on Smart Inverter Compressor)

faqs.question: Can I control this fridge from my phone?
faqs.answer: Yes. The LS25CBBDIK supports LG ThinQ over Wi-Fi, letting you monitor settings, get door-open alerts and run Smart Diagnosis troubleshooting from your smartphone.

faqs.question: How long does LinearCooling keep food fresh?
faqs.answer: LinearCooling reduces internal temperature fluctuations and helps lock in freshness for up to 7 days compared with conventional cooling.

faqs.question: Is it certified for use in Saudi Arabia?
faqs.answer: Yes. This model is SASO certified for energy performance in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.

title: Hisense 583L (20.5 cu.ft) Four-Door Cross Door Refrigerator with Inverter Compressor - RQ72W2NR, Stainless Steel
description: The Hisense RQ72W2NR is a striking 583-litre (20.5 cu.ft) four-door cross-door refrigerator with a flat stainless-steel design that adds a premium look to any kitchen. Two independent cooling systems serve the fridge and freezer separately, preventing odour transfer and keeping humidity ideal for each zone. An energy-efficient inverter compressor delivers powerful, quiet performance, while Total No Frost technology eliminates manual defrosting. Wide french-door shelves and dual lower freezer drawers make it easy to store large platters and bulk frozen goods.
shortDescription: 583L four-door cross-door fridge with twin cooling, inverter compressor and No Frost.
warranty: 2 years manufacturer warranty (10 years on compressor)

images.alt: Hisense RQ72W2NR 583L four-door cross door refrigerator in stainless steel
Hisense RQ72W2NR four-door refrigerator with doors open
Hisense RQ72W2NR refrigerator interior with shelving and drawers

faqs.question: Why does it have two separate cooling systems?
faqs.answer: The fridge and freezer each have an independent cooling system, which prevents odour and moisture transfer between compartments and keeps the optimal humidity in each zone for fresher food.

faqs.question: Is this a French-door or side-by-side design?
faqs.answer: It is a four-door cross-door (French-door) layout: two doors over the refrigerator section on top and two pull-out freezer drawers below.

faqs.question: Does it need manual defrosting?
faqs.answer: No. Total No Frost technology automatically prevents ice and frost build-up, so manual defrosting is not required.

title: LG 11kg Front Load Washing Machine with AI DD, TurboWash & Steam - WFR1114MB, Middle Black
description: The LG WFR1114MB is an 11kg front-load washing machine built around LG's AI DD technology, which senses both the weight and the softness of each load and selects the optimal wash motions to protect fabrics. TurboWash gets large loads thoroughly clean in as little as 59 minutes, while LG Steam removes up to 99.9% of allergens and reduces wrinkles. The Inverter Direct Drive motor spins up to 1400 rpm for fast drying and runs quietly with less vibration, backed by a 10-year motor warranty. Smart Diagnosis helps you troubleshoot quickly, all wrapped in a sleek middle-black finish.
shortDescription: 11kg front-load washer with AI DD, TurboWash, Steam and 1400 rpm Direct Drive motor.
warranty: 2 years manufacturer warranty (10 years on Inverter Direct Drive motor)

faqs.question: What does AI DD do?
faqs.answer: AI DD detects the weight of the load and senses how soft the fabric is, then automatically chooses the best drum motions to clean effectively while protecting your clothes from wear.

faqs.question: How fast can it wash a full load?
faqs.answer: With TurboWash technology, the WFR1114MB can wash a large load thoroughly in as little as 59 minutes.

faqs.question: Does the steam function help with allergies?
faqs.answer: Yes. LG Steam removes up to 99.9% of allergens such as dust mites and also helps reduce wrinkles by around 30%.

title: Samsung 8kg Front Load Washing Machine with EcoBubble, Hygiene Steam & Digital Inverter - WW80TA046AX, 1400 RPM
description: The Samsung WW80TA046AX is an 8kg front-load washing machine that uses EcoBubble technology to dissolve detergent into active bubbles, penetrating fabrics quickly even in cold water for a powerful yet gentle clean. Hygiene Steam removes ingrained dirt and allergens from deep within the fibres, while the Digital Inverter Motor delivers quiet, energy-efficient performance with a 1400 rpm spin and a 10-year motor warranty. A Drum Clean cycle keeps the inside fresh, and 14 wash programs cover everything from quick daily washes to heavily soiled loads. Wi-Fi connectivity lets you start and monitor cycles from your phone.
shortDescription: 8kg EcoBubble front-load washer with Hygiene Steam, Digital Inverter and 1400 rpm spin.
warranty: 2 years manufacturer warranty (10 years on Digital Inverter Motor)

faqs.question: What is EcoBubble and why does it matter?
faqs.answer: EcoBubble mixes detergent with air and water to create bubbles that penetrate fabric faster, giving a powerful clean even in cold water — which saves energy while being gentle on clothes.

faqs.question: Can I control this washer with my phone?
faqs.answer: Yes. The WW80TA046AX includes Wi-Fi smart control, so you can start, pause and monitor cycles and receive end-of-cycle notifications from the Samsung app.

faqs.question: Is the motor warranty really 10 years?
faqs.answer: Yes. Samsung provides a 10-year warranty on the Digital Inverter Motor in addition to the 2-year overall manufacturer warranty.

title: Toshiba 10kg Top Load Washing Machine with Ultra Fine Bubble & Great Waves Wash - AW-UK1100HUPBB(SG), Silver
description: The Toshiba AW-UK1100HUPBB is a 10kg top-load washing machine that combines a Great Waves Wash system of three powerful water flows with Ultra Fine Bubble technology to lift away stubborn dirt deep within fabrics. Cold Wash and Colour Alive features help protect colours and reduce energy use, while the I-Clean self-cleaning cycle keeps the drum hygienic by reducing bacterial build-up. A durable silver glass top and intuitive program selection make daily laundry simple, and the spacious 10kg drum easily handles large family loads. It is supplied with a 2-year manufacturer warranty.
shortDescription: 10kg top-load washer with Ultra Fine Bubble, Great Waves Wash and I-Clean self-cleaning.

faqs.question: What is Ultra Fine Bubble technology?
faqs.answer: Ultra Fine Bubble generates microscopic bubbles that penetrate deep into fabric fibres to lift away dirt and detergent residue for a more thorough clean.

faqs.question: How does the I-Clean function help?
faqs.answer: I-Clean is an automatic self-cleaning mode that runs a hygiene cycle to reduce bacterial build-up inside the drum, keeping the machine fresh between washes.

faqs.question: Is 10kg enough for a family?
faqs.answer: Yes. The 10kg drum comfortably handles large family loads, including bulky items like bedsheets and towels, in a single wash.

title: Gree AI Pro Inverter Split Air Conditioner 18000 BTU Cooling Only - GWC18AVDXF-S6DTA1C
description: The Gree GWC18AVDXF-S6DTA1C is a 1.5-ton wall-mounted split air conditioner powered by AI Pro DC inverter technology that continuously adjusts compressor speed for stable temperatures and lower energy bills. Delivering 18,000 BTU of cooling, it is ideal for medium living rooms, bedrooms and offices of roughly 18 to 28 square metres. It uses eco-friendly R32 refrigerant, a Gold Fin anti-corrosion condenser and a multi-stage filtration system for cleaner, healthier air. Built-in Wi-Fi lets you control cooling, timers and modes from the Gree+ smartphone app.

description: The Braun Silk-expert Pro 5 PL5137 is an at-home IPL device that delivers permanent visible hair reduction in as little as four weeks. With ultra-fast flashes it can treat both legs in around five minutes, and it offers gentle, normal and extra-gentle modes for sensitive areas such as the face and bikini line. The device comes with a precision head and a Venus razor, and is suitable for both women and men.
shortDescription: At-home IPL device with SensoAdapt skin sensor for permanent visible hair reduction in as little as 4 weeks.

faqs.question: How long until I see results?
faqs.answer: Most users see permanent visible hair reduction in as little as four weeks when following the recommended treatment schedule.

faqs.question: Is it safe for my skin tone?
faqs.answer: The SensoAdapt sensor reads your skin tone 80 times per second and automatically sets a safe, effective intensity. It is suitable for a wide range of skin tones but not the very darkest.

faqs.question: Can it be used on the face and bikini area?
faqs.answer: Yes. It includes gentle and extra-gentle modes and a precision head for sensitive areas such as the face and bikini line.

title: Black+Decker 7-in-1 Steam Mop with SteamGlove Handheld Steamer HSMC1361SGP
description: The Black+Decker HSMC1361SGP is a versatile 7-in-1 steam-cleaning system that combines a powerful upright steam mop with a detachable SteamGlove handheld steamer. Using only the natural power of steam, it sanitises and deep-cleans sealed hard floors, tile, grout, glass, upholstery and more without harsh chemicals. The handheld unit and included accessory tools let you tackle bathrooms, kitchens, windows and tight corners with ease. With fast heat-up and an extra-large water tank, it delivers continuous steam for longer cleaning sessions around the home.

faqs.question: What surfaces can I clean with it?
faqs.answer: It cleans sealed hard floors, tile, grout, sealed wood, glass and upholstery. The handheld SteamGlove also tackles bathrooms, kitchens and tight spots.

faqs.question: Do I need cleaning chemicals?
faqs.answer: No. It cleans and sanitises using only the natural power of steam, so no detergents or harsh chemicals are required.

faqs.question: How fast is it ready to use?
faqs.answer: It heats up quickly and is typically ready to produce steam in under 30 seconds.
